+ Enemy(hp : int, damage : int)+ TakeDamage(amount: int) : void {virtual}
+ Attack() : void

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 262px; height: 1px; padding-top: 705px; margin-left: 1418px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0px; text-align: left;

div.div:
if thugs.Count < amount return (false,null)
else
for i=0, i<amount, i++
thugs[i].Simulation:=simulation
thugsCopy.Add(thugs[i])
thugs.RemoveRange(0,amount)
return (true,thugCopy)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 477px; margin-left: 1262px;

div.div:
hp := hp - amount
if hp <= 0
if(simulation not null)
simulation.DeleteEnemy(this)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 845px; margin-left: 1362px;

div.div:
if thugs.Count > 0
(_,elem) = MAX t.Hp
t in thugs
elem.TakeDamage(amount)
if(elem.Hp()<=0)
thugs.Remove(elem)
else base.TakeDamage(amount)
